notes: Crustacean braggadocio rap. 'Clack clack' is the onomatopoeic signature — the claw on the snare. 'Prawn, prawn, prawn' is a three-beat taunt. AUDITED 2026-04-20: demoted most bars to ribbons so the two true hooks (prawn-taunt + final clack) can land without competition. Ribbon emphasis preserved so each peak still feels bigger than the ambient verse.

chunks.note: Rock lobster, mob lobster — opening declaration rides on ribbon amber scroll
Clack clack — first hook, mixed (sound becomes signal)
lobster trap if you dare — hook pt2
Prawn, prawn, prawn — three-beat taunt, one of two keys on the song
rock lobster snap — peak verse, still a ribbon
I'm the crustacean — the boast, big ribbon
Clack clack — final signature, mic drop, biggest key
